mapper.select:
SELECT p.id AS spu_id, p.spu_code, p.name, c.name AS category_name, p.main_image_url, f.name AS fit_type, MIN(s.sale_price) AS min_price, MAX(s.sale_price) AS max_price FROM product_spu p JOIN category c ON c.id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN fit_type f ON f.id = p.fit_type_id JOIN product_sku s ON s.spu_id = p.id WHERE p.status = 'on_sale'
AND ( p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keywordValue}, '%') OR p.spu_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keywordValue}, '%') OR c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keywordValue}, '%') )
AND c.name = #{categoryValue}
GROUP BY p.id, p.spu_code, p.name, c.name, p.main_image_url, f.name ORDER BY p.id

SELECT p.id AS spu_id, p.spu_code, p.name, c.name AS category_name, p.description, p.main_image_url, f.name AS fit_type, MIN(s.sale_price) AS min_price, MAX(s.sale_price) AS max_price FROM product_spu p JOIN category c ON c.id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN fit_type f ON f.id = p.fit_type_id JOIN product_sku s ON s.spu_id = p.id WHERE p.id = #{spuId} GROUP BY p.id, p.spu_code, p.name, c.name, p.description, p.main_image_url, f.name

SELECT s.id AS sku_id, s.sku_code, s.spu_id, p.name AS product_name, co.name AS color, so.code AS size, s.sale_price, s.status FROM product_sku s JOIN product_spu p ON p.id = s.spu_id JOIN color co ON co.id = s.color_id JOIN size_option so ON so.id = s.size_id WHERE s.spu_id = #{spuId} AND co.name = #{color} AND so.code = #{size} AND s.status = 'on_sale'

SELECT p.id AS spu_id, sku.id AS sku_id, sku.sku_code, p.spu_code, p.name, c.name AS category_name, p.main_image_url, f.name AS fit_type, co.name AS color, so.code AS size, ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(m.name ORDER BY m.id SEPARATOR ',') FROM product_material pm JOIN material m ON m.id = pm.material_id WHERE pm.spu_id = p.id ) AS materials, ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(se.code ORDER BY se.id SEPARATOR ',') FROM product_season ps JOIN season se ON se.id = ps.season_id WHERE ps.spu_id = p.id ) AS seasons, ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(st.code ORDER BY st.id SEPARATOR ',') FROM product_style_tag pst JOIN style_tag st ON st.id = pst.style_tag_id WHERE pst.spu_id = p.id ) AS style_tags, ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(pa.attr_name, ':', pa.attr_value) ORDER BY pa.id SEPARATOR ',') FROM product_attribute pa WHERE pa.spu_id = p.id ) AS attribute_tags FROM product_spu p JOIN category c ON c.id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN fit_type f ON f.id = p.fit_type_id JOIN product_sku sku ON sku.spu_id = p.id JOIN color co ON co.id = sku.color_id JOIN size_option so ON so.id = sku.size_id WHERE p.status = 'on_sale' AND sku.status = 'on_sale'
AND c.name = #{categoryValue}
AND f.code = #{fitValue}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM product_style_tag pst JOIN style_tag st ON st.id = pst.style_tag_id WHERE pst.spu_id = p.id AND st.code = #{styleValue} )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM product_season ps JOIN season se ON se.id = ps.season_id WHERE ps.spu_id = p.id AND se.code = #{seasonValue} )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM product_material pm JOIN material m ON m.id = pm.material_id WHERE pm.spu_id = p.id AND m.name = #{materialValue} )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM product_attribute gender_attr WHERE gender_attr.spu_id = p.id AND gender_attr.attr_name = '适用性别' AND gender_attr.attr_value IN (#{genderValue}, 'unisex') )
ORDER BY p.id ASC, sku.id ASC

SELECT p.id AS spu_id, sku.id AS sku_id, sku.sku_code, p.spu_code, p.name, c.name AS category_name, p.main_image_url, f.name AS fit_type, co.name AS color, so.code AS size, (
SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(m.name ORDER BY m.id SEPARATOR ',') FROM product_material pm JOIN material m ON m.id = pm.material_id WHERE pm.spu_id = p.id ) AS materials, ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(se.code ORDER BY se.id SEPARATOR ',') FROM product_season ps JOIN season se ON se.id = ps.season_id WHERE ps.spu_id = p.id ) AS seasons, ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(st.code ORDER BY st.id SEPARATOR ',') FROM product_style_tag pst JOIN style_tag st ON st.id = pst.style_tag_id WHERE pst.spu_id = p.id ) AS style_tags, ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(pa.attr_name, ':', pa.attr_value) ORDER BY pa.id SEPARATOR ',') FROM product_attribute pa WHERE pa.spu_id = p.id ) AS attribute_tags, sku.sale_price, CASE WHEN COALESCE(inv.available_stock, 0) > 0 THEN 'in_stock' ELSE 'out_of_stock' END AS stock_status, ( SELECT MIN(inner_sku.sale_price) FROM product_sku inner_sku WHERE inner_sku.spu_id = p.id AND inner_sku.status = 'on_sale' ) AS min_price, ( SELECT MAX(inner_sku.sale_price) FROM product_sku inner_sku WHERE inner_sku.spu_id = p.id AND inner_sku.status = 'on_sale' ) AS max_price, ( SELECT COALESCE(SUM(inner_inv.available_stock), 0) FROM product_sku inner_sku LEFT JOIN inventory inner_inv ON inner_inv.sku_id = inner_sku.id WHERE inner_sku.spu_id = p.id AND inner_sku.status = 'on_sale' ) AS total_available_stock, COALESCE(inv.available_stock, 0) AS available_stock FROM product_spu p JOIN category c ON c.id = p.category_id LEFT JOIN fit_type f ON f.id = p.fit_type_id JOIN product_sku sku ON sku.spu_id = p.id JOIN color co ON co.id = sku.color_id JOIN size_option so ON so.id = sku.size_id LEFT JOIN inventory inv ON inv.sku_id = sku.id WHERE p.status = 'on_sale' AND sku.status = 'on_sale'
AND c.name = #{categoryValue}
AND f.code = #{fitValue}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM product_style_tag pst JOIN style_tag st ON st.id = pst.style_tag_id WHERE pst.spu_id = p.id AND st.code = #{styleValue} )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM product_season ps JOIN season se ON se.id = ps.season_id WHERE ps.spu_id = p.id AND se.code = #{seasonValue} )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM product_material pm JOIN material m ON m.id = pm.material_id WHERE pm.spu_id = p.id AND m.name = #{materialValue} )
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM product_attribute gender_attr WHERE gender_attr.spu_id = p.id AND gender_attr.attr_name = '适用性别' AND gender_attr.attr_value IN (#{genderValue}, 'unisex') )
AND COALESCE(inv.available_stock, 0) > 0
AND sku.sale_price <= #{query.budgetMax}
ORDER BY available_stock DESC, sku.sale_price ASC, p.id ASC, sku.id ASC
SELECT m.name FROM product_material pm JOIN material m ON m.id = pm.material_id WHERE pm.spu_id = #{spuId} ORDER BY m.id
SELECT se.code FROM product_season ps JOIN season se ON se.id = ps.season_id WHERE ps.spu_id = #{spuId} ORDER BY se.id
SELECT st.code FROM product_style_tag pst JOIN style_tag st ON st.id = pst.style_tag_id WHERE pst.spu_id = #{spuId} ORDER BY st.id
SELECT attr_name, attr_value FROM product_attribute WHERE spu_id = #{spuId} ORDER BY id
